article.title: Ronnie James Dio diskografisi
article.content: Bu, Ronnie James Dio sürümlerinin bir listesidir. 45 rpm single'larındaki ilk görünümlerinden bazıları, 1980'lerde piyasaya sürülen The History of Syracuse Music LP dizisinin birkaç cildinde toplanmıştır. Şarkı sözleriyle eksiksiz bir diskografi burada bulunabilir. == Çıkış == === Ronnie & The Red Caps === === Ronnie Dio & The Prophets === ==== Singlelar ==== ==== Albümler ==== === The Electric Elves === === The Elves === ==== Singlelar ==== ==== Bootlegs ==== === Elf === ==== Stüdyo albümleri ==== ==== Derlemeler ==== ==== Bootlegs ==== === Rainbow === ==== Stüdyo albümleri ==== ==== Canlı Albümler ==== === Black Sabbath === ==== Stüdyo albümleri ==== ==== Canlı Albümler ==== === Dio === ==== Stüdyo albümleri ==== Holy Diver (1983) US 2× Platinum UK Silver The Last in Line (1984) US Platinum UK Silver Sacred Heart (1985) US Gold Dream Evil (1987) Lock up the Wolves (1990) Strange Highways (1993) Angry Machines (1996) Magica (2000) Killing the Dragon (2002) Master of the Moon (2004) ==== Canlı Albümler ==== Intermission (1986) Sacred Heart (DVD 1986) Inferno: Last in Live (1998) We Rock (DVD 2005) Evil or Divine – Live in New York City (2005) Holy Diver – Live (2006) Dio at Donington UK: Live 1983 & 1987 (2010) Finding the Sacred Heart – Live in Philly 1986 (2013) Live in London, Hammersmith Apollo 1993 (2014) ==== Derlemeler ==== Diamonds – The Best of Dio (1992) The Very Beast of Dio (2000) The Very Beast of Dio Vol. 2 (2012) === Heaven & Hell === ==== Stüdyo albümleri ==== The Devil You Know (2009) ==== Canlı Albümler ==== Live from Radio City Music Hall (2007) Neon Nights: 30 Years of Heaven & Hell (2010) === Diğer görünümler === Bobby Comstock & The Counts: "Your Big Brown Eyes" 7" Single (1960), "Run My Heart" 7" Single (1963) The Angels: My Boyfriend's Back 7" Single (1963), My Boyfriend's Back (1963) Austin Gravelding: Self Made Man (1970) Roger Glover: The Butterfly Ball and the Grasshopper's Feast (1974) David Coverdale: Northwinds (1978) Kerry Livgren: Seeds of Change (1980), The Best of Kerry Livgren (2002) Heaven: Where Angels Fear to Tread (1983) Rough Cutt: LA's Hottest Unsigned Rock Bands (1983), KLOS 95 1/2 Rock to Riches (1983), Rough Cutt (1984), Rough Cutt Live (1996), Anthology (2008) Hellion: 12 Commandments in Metal (1985), To Hellion and Back (2014) (production only) Hear 'n Aid: Hear 'n Aid (1986), "Stars" 7"/12" Single (1986), Hear 'n Aid: The Sessions (VHS video) (1986) Eddie Hardin & Guests: Wizard's Convention (1994) Dog Eat Dog: Play Games (1996) Munetaka Higuchi with Dream Castle: Free World (1997) Pat Boone: In a Metal Mood: No More Mr. Nice Guy (1997) Various Artists: Humanary Stew: A tribute to Alice Cooper (1999), Not the Same Old Song and Dance: A Tribute to Aerosmith (1999), We Wish you a Metal Xmas and a Headbanging New Year (2008) Deep Purple: In Concert with The London Symphony Orchestra (1999), Live at the Rotterdam Ahoy (2001), The Soundboard Series (2001) Eddie Ojeda: Axes 2 Axes (2005) Ian Gillan: Gillan's Inn (2006) Queensrÿche: Operation: Mindcrime II (2006), Mindcrime at the Moore (2007) Tenacious D: The Pick of Destiny (2006) Various Artists with Steve Lukather, In Session (2008) Girlschool: Legacy (2008) David "Rock" Feinstein: Bitten By the Beast (2010) The Rods: Vengeance (2011) === Diğer medya === The Black Sabbath Story (Belgesel, Vol. 2) (1992) Metal: A Headbangers Journey (Belgesel) (2005) Heavy: The Story of Heavy Metal (Belgesel) (2006) Tenacious D in the Pick of Destiny (Film) (2006) That Metal Show – Season 2, Episode 8: Heaven & Hell (2009) == Stüdyo albümleri zaman çizelgesi == == Ek müzisyen zaman çizelgesi == == Kaynakça == == Dış bağlantılar == Resmî site

chunks.content: Bu, Ronnie James Dio sürümlerinin bir listesidir. 45 rpm single'larındaki ilk görünümlerinden bazıları, 1980'lerde piyasaya sürülen The History of Syracuse Music LP dizisinin birkaç cildinde toplanmıştır. Şarkı sözleriyle eksiksiz bir diskografi burada bulunabilir.

==== Stüdyo albümleri ==== Holy Diver (1983) US 2× Platinum UK Silver The Last in Line (1984) US Platinum UK Silver Sacred Heart (1985) US Gold Dream Evil (1987) Lock up the Wolves (1990) Strange Highways (1993) Angry Machines (1996) Magica (2000) Killing the Dragon (2002) Master of the Moon (2004)

==== Canlı Albümler ==== Intermission (1986) Sacred Heart (DVD 1986) Inferno: Last in Live (1998) We Rock (DVD 2005) Evil or Divine – Live in New York City (2005) Holy Diver – Live (2006) Dio at Donington UK: Live 1983 & 1987 (2010) Finding the Sacred Heart – Live in Philly 1986 (2013) Live in London, Hammersmith Apollo 1993 (2014)
==== Derlemeler ==== Diamonds – The Best of Dio (1992) The Very Beast of Dio (2000) The Very Beast of Dio Vol. 2 (2012)
==== Stüdyo albümleri ==== The Devil You Know (2009)
==== Canlı Albümler ==== Live from Radio City Music Hall (2007) Neon Nights: 30 Years of Heaven & Hell (2010)

=== Diğer görünümler === Bobby Comstock & The Counts: "Your Big Brown Eyes" 7" Single (1960), "Run My Heart" 7" Single (1963) The Angels: My Boyfriend's Back 7" Single (1963), My Boyfriend's Back (1963) Austin Gravelding: Self Made Man (1970) Roger Glover: The Butterfly Ball and the Grasshopper's Feast (1974) David Coverdale: Northwinds (1978) Kerry Livgren: Seeds of Change (1980), The Best of Kerry Livgren (2002) Heaven: Where Angels Fear to Tread (1983) Rough Cutt: LA's Hottest Unsigned Rock Bands (1983), KLOS 95 1/2 Rock to Riches (1983), Rough Cutt (1984), Rough Cutt Live (1996), Anthology (2008) Hellion: 12 Commandments in Metal (1985), To Hellion and Back (2014) (production only) Hear 'n Aid: Hear 'n Aid (1986), "Stars" 7"/12" Single (1986), Hear 'n Aid: The Sessions (VHS video) (1986) Eddie Hardin & Guests: Wizard's Convention (1994) Dog Eat Dog: Play Games (1996) Munetaka Higuchi with Dream Castle: Free World (1997) Pat Boone: In a Metal Mood: No More Mr. Nice Guy (1997) Variou

6) Eddie Hardin & Guests: Wizard's Convention (1994) Dog Eat Dog: Play Games (1996) Munetaka Higuchi with Dream Castle: Free World (1997) Pat Boone: In a Metal Mood: No More Mr. Nice Guy (1997) Various Artists: Humanary Stew: A tribute to Alice Cooper (1999), Not the Same Old Song and Dance: A Tribute to Aerosmith (1999), We Wish you a Metal Xmas and a Headbanging New Year (2008) Deep Purple: In Concert with The London Symphony Orchestra (1999), Live at the Rotterdam Ahoy (2001), The Soundboard Series (2001) Eddie Ojeda: Axes 2 Axes (2005) Ian Gillan: Gillan's Inn (2006) Queensrÿche: Operation: Mindcrime II (2006), Mindcrime at the Moore (2007) Tenacious D: The Pick of Destiny (2006) Various Artists with Steve Lukather, In Session (2008) Girlschool: Legacy (2008) David "Rock" Feinstein: Bitten By the Beast (2010) The Rods: Vengeance (2011)

=== Diğer medya === The Black Sabbath Story (Belgesel, Vol. 2) (1992) Metal: A Headbangers Journey (Belgesel) (2005) Heavy: The Story of Heavy Metal (Belgesel) (2006) Tenacious D in the Pick of Destiny (Film) (2006) That Metal Show – Season 2, Episode 8: Heaven & Hell (2009)

items.question: Roger Glover, hangi albümü 1974 yılında yayınladı?
items.answer: The Butterfly Ball and the Grasshopper's Feast

items.question: Ronnie James Dio'nun yayınları hangi farklı müzik formatlarını kapsamaktadır?
items.answer: Ronnie James Dio'nun yayınları, 45 rpm single'larındaki ilk görünümlerini ve Holy Diver gibi stüdyo albümlerini içermektedir.
